messages.text: A1-2This is part of an automated test. The following is an instruction for a web agent: Find the item [Logitech G433 7.1 Wired Gaming Headset with DTS Headphone: X 7.1 Surround for PC, PS4, PS4 PRO, Xbox One, Xbox One S, Nintendo Switch – Fire Red] on this online shopping webpage and purchase it using the default payment and shipping information. messages.speaker: Planner
messages.text:
1) On the current page, look for a visible site search bar (usually at the top). If visible, click it, type: “Logitech G433 7.1 Wired Gaming Headset Fire Red”, and submit. If no search bar is visible, first scan the header for a Search icon, then for a “Headsets” or “Gaming Headsets” category link under Electronics/PC Gaming and click it.
2) In search/results, focus on items visible without scrolling; look for a listing whose title includes all: “Logitech G433”, “7.1”, “DTS Headphone:X”, and “Fire Red”. If not immediately visible, apply filters if available: Brand=Logitech; Category=Headsets; Color=Red. Click the exact product.
3) On the product page, verify details in the visible area: model “G433”, “DTS Headphone:X 7.1”, platform compatibility mentions PC/PS4/PS4 Pro/Xbox One/Xbox One S/Nintendo Switch, and color/variant set to Fire Red. If a color selector is present, choose “Fire Red”.
4) Click “Add to Cart” (or “Buy Now” if present). If quantity selector is visible, keep at 1. Stay in the same tab.
5) In any mini-cart popup, click “Proceed to Checkout” or “Go to Cart”. On the cart page, confirm the correct item and color are listed.
6) Proceed to Checkout. On the shipping step, ensure the default address is selected (already signed in). Continue.
7) On the payment step, ensure the default payment method is selected. Review order total.
8) Pause and request your approval to place the order. After approval, click “Place Order” (or equivalent). Capture the order confirmation number and total.
